item.title: Top 10 Priorities for a New Product Security Leader in a Global Healthcare Company
item.description: A secure-by-design, quality/Safety first leadership playbook for healthcare manufacturing product security across legacy, connected, AI-enabled, regulated, and non-regulated products.

item.title: Next-Gen Zero Trust Security Architecture for AI: A 2026+ Enterprise Reference Model
item.description: A CISO-oriented guide to securing the full AI lifecycle across GenAI, RAG, agentic AI, multi-agent systems, and traditional ML using Zero Trust, threat modeling, assurance, and AI SecOps.

item.title: Securing the AI Frontier: Navigating Supply Chain Risks and Mitigations in a Layered AI SecOps Architecture
item.description: Layered AI SecOps Framework across four horizons =>
